trivia: The last mainline airliner from the company that taught the world to build airliners. Quiet Rolls-Royce Tays and honest engineering kept it in service long after Fokker itself vanished in 1996.
Australia is the type's unlikely sanctuary: Alliance Airlines built the world's largest remaining fleet for mining charters.
funFacts: Alliance Airlines in Australia keeps dozens flying.
